recipe.title: Best Chicken Enchiladas Ever (Tex-Mex)

ingredients.name: avocado or olive oil (filling saute)
ingredients.note: For chicken-bean saute; separate oil for sauce roux uses its own measurement on sauce page.

ingredients.name: sea salt and freshly cracked black pepper
large flour tortillas
ingredients.note: Recipe default; corn possible with tortilla prep variation.

ingredients.name: shredded cheese (Mexican blend or similar)
ingredients.note: Filling rolls plus topping; Pepper Jack optional.

ingredients.name: red enchilada sauce
ingredients.note: Homemade Southwestern tomato-free red sauce from linked sibling recipe.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.note: Roux thickener; GF blend substitution possible.

ingredients.name: fine sea salt
ingredients.note: Sauce seasoning; blogger often cites about 1/2 teaspoon baseline.

ingredients.name: optional fresh toppings
ingredients.note: Cilantro, red onion, avocado, sour cream, cotija crumble.

steps.text: Heat avocado or olive oil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat for the homemade enchilada sauce.
steps.visualCue: thin film of oil shimmering with clean heat whisper
steps.runwayRisk: indistinguishable between generic sauté oil clips

steps.text: Add all-purpose flour; cook whisking constantly about 1 minute to form roux paste.
steps.visualCue: smooth blonde paste tightening on whisk tines
steps.textureCue: matte flour absorbing oil toward compact slurry
steps.runwayRisk: whisk speed reads as frantic blur unless framed tight

steps.text: Add chili powder, garlic powder, cumin and oregano; cook whisking constantly 1 minute to toast spices in roux.
steps.visualCue: brick-red dust blooming into warmed fat
steps.textureCue: dry spice granules marrying fat into rusty velvet
steps.runwayRisk: spice dust could read as cocoa or paprika mistaken identity

steps.text: Gradually pour in chicken or vegetable stock while whisking until smooth and lump-free.
steps.visualCue: thin rivulets cutting roux ribbons into silky sauce body
steps.textureCue: emulsion tightening from gritty to cohesive pourable sauce
steps.runwayRisk: lump formation if pour cadence mismatched visually

steps.text: Bring sauce to simmer; maintain gentle low bubbles uncovered 10-15 minutes until slightly thickened.
steps.visualCue: lazy surface burbles and satin meniscus glide
steps.textureCue: low reduction velvety nap on spatula back
steps.runwayRisk: simmer mistaken for vigorous boil collapses glossy read

steps.text: Season enchilada sauce with fine sea salt to taste after tasting.
steps.visualCue: fine salt disappearing into dark red swirl
steps.textureCue: post-season gloss sharpening cling on metal spoon
steps.runwayRisk: minimal standalone motion aside from swirl

steps.text: Preheat oven to 350°F and lightly grease a 9 x 13 inch baking dish for enchiladas.
steps.visualCue: open oven cavity amber glow cue
steps.textureCue: dry dish sheen after grease brushing
steps.runwayRisk: oven reads as generic appliance without food anchor

steps.text: Heat 2 tablespoons oil in large sauté pan over medium-high heat; sauté diced onion ~3 minutes until softened stirring occasionally.
steps.visualCue: translucent onion edges with audible sizzle fringe
steps.textureCue: onion sweating from crunchy white to supple glass

steps.text: Add diced chicken and canned green chiles; season generously with salt and pepper; sauté 6-8 minutes until chicken cooked through, stirring occasionally.
steps.visualCue: pink chicken cubes whitening with pepper fleck pop
steps.textureCue: protein tightening and releasing pooled juices that reduce
steps.runwayRisk: doneness color subtle on diced breast

steps.text: Stir in rinsed drained black beans until evenly combined then remove filling from heat and set aside.
steps.visualCue: dark beans marrying paler chicken tumble
steps.textureCue: beans coat lightly with reduced pan juices satin

steps.text: Lay out tortillas, prepared enchilada sauce, cooked chicken filling and shredded cheese for assembly line rolling.
steps.visualCue: parallel stacks implying flow not static pantry flatlay
steps.textureCue: warmed tortilla slight flex versus dry crack risk
steps.runwayRisk: looks like mise lineup if framed too wide and static

steps.text: Spread about 2 tablespoons enchilada sauce evenly across face of tortilla before filling.
steps.visualCue: rust-red sauce halo dragged by spoon belly
steps.textureCue: semi-thick sauce tack on porous flour tortilla
steps.runwayRisk: sauce quantity misread floods tortilla visually

steps.text: Add generous spoonful of chicken filling in line down tortilla center.
steps.visualCue: mounded savory strip with glossy bean glimpses
steps.runwayRisk: filling slump off-center breaks roll symmetry

steps.text: Sprinkle about 1/3 cup shredded cheese over filling stripe then roll tortilla closed and transfer seam-down to baking dish.
steps.visualCue: cheese snowfall then cylinder tuck with seam discipline
steps.textureCue: shreds softening slight contact heat from filling

steps.text: Repeat to fill baking dish snugly then spread remaining enchilada sauce evenly over rolls followed by remaining cheese snowfall.
steps.visualCue: sauce tidal pour across white tortilla backs then cheese avalanche
steps.textureCue: sauce settles into grooves between cylinders
steps.runwayRisk: coverage bald patches if pour uneven

steps.text: Bake uncovered ~20 minutes at 350°F until heated through with tortillas lightly crisp outside and melted cheese topping.
steps.visualCue: surface cheese blister micro-bubbles and nutty edge tan
steps.runwayRisk: over-brown reads burnt not Tex-Mex home

steps.text: Transfer baking dish briefly to rack; serve immediately hot garnished cilantro onion avocado sour cream or cotija as desired.
steps.visualCue: bright herbs and ivory crema ribbons over red sauce glaze
steps.textureCue: cool crema dribble against hot bubbly cheese contrast
steps.runwayRisk: garnish avalanche hides hero cheese texture

assumptions: Flour tortillas are the default tortilla for easier rolling as written (corn optional with flash-fry or warm-sauce dip workflow).
Homemade Southwestern tomato-free red enchilada sauce from the sibling Gimme Some Oven recipe batch is paired with these enchiladas for strongest flavor payoff.
Sauce simmer can overlap oven preheat and filling prep so total timeline stays near one hour headline without serializing every minute.
Cheese behaves like a Mexican shredded blend melting into soft stretch (Pepper Jack acceptable variant).
SFX and pacing follow production defaults: ASMR-forward seedance2 and asmr_food style preset.
Image references for ambiguous rolled cross-section or cheese blister climax may need explicit GPT image stills labeled as fragile states.
Licorn kitchen anchors global references with @KitchenIslandDefault per Seedance References policy.
TTS eleven_multilingual_v2 and eleven_text_to_sound_v2 noted as pipeline defaults though this ingest stores no voiced script.
criticalTransformations: Roux binds oil and flour before chili powder toasted matrix accepts stock emulsion lump-free simmer reduction to clingy satin red Southwestern sauce
Diced breast transitions from blush pink translucent centers to opaque white curds releasing then reabsorbing savory juices alongside soft onion and earthy beans
Loose grated cheese melts into fused blanket with blister micro-domes while exposed tortilla ridges desiccate to light crisp laminar contrast against steamy interiors
Optional cool crema drizzle hits molten cheese creating thickening swirl rivulets and sudden steam wisps around herb scatter
visualTextureOpportunities: Close macro of whisk dragging through brick-red spiced roux snapping into glossy swirl on first stock splash
Lazy bubble field across reducing sauce meniscus catching low warm kitchen reflections
Onion dice glassing edges in shimmer oil soundtracking sizzle ASMR fringe
Chicken cube flip revealing still-pink facets whitening in fast succession
Black beans pouring into saute pan cascading gloss coat over poultry
Spoon smoothing two tablespoon annular swoosh sauce on supple flour tortilla topography
Cheese snowfall freeze-frame shards tumbling onto warm filling mound
Rolling torque fingers tucking cylindrical seam-down placement into tight casserole lattice
Ladle tidal wash of leftover sauce drowning pale tortilla roofs before final cheese snowfall
Oven-lit cheese blister inflation with tiny pop promise
Spatula first-lift unveiling stretch cheese bridge from pan
Cilantro feather scatter and ivory crema zigzag contrasting molten reds
possibleHooks: Open on brick-red spiced roux avalanche meeting hot oil micro-shiver before stock saves it into silk
First stock pour fracturing dusty roux into cinematic swirl ASMR hinge
Aggressive saute hiss as chicken cubes surface-sear from pink to snowy white cubes
Assembly line macro: scarlet spoon painting tortilla then cheese blizzard trapping steam
Post-bake cheese dome micro-bubbles pulsing before crema dagger chill contrast
promptPolicySources: Workspace rule seedance-references: seedance2, References mode only, nine-image cap per segment, each reference role spelled, @KitchenIslandDefault mandatory global anchor

Workspace rule recipe-agent-core: thirty to forty-eight logical editorial scenes, five to ten Seedance segments, seventy-five to eighty percent detail shots versus context, fragile food states merit reference stills instead of hallucinated interpolations
Source page Gimme Some Oven Chicken Enchiladas canonical ingredients and timings plus linked red sauce structural steps for roux-stock-simmer pillar
Skill seedance-workflow: English prompts, hard cuts mandatory timing negatives ban speech voiceover music, integrated kitchen ASMR
Production defaults ingest note: video model seedance2, reference image generator gpt_image_2 noted for planned states only in this workspace

clarifyingQuestions.question: Should the Seedance visuals lock to flour tortillas (easy roll) or switch to warmed corn tortillas with flash-fry or sauce-dip choreography for authenticity emphasis?
clarifyingQuestions.reason: Tortilla type changes roll geometry, tactile stress cracks, reflective sauce uptake, reference stills count, and brittle risk notes.

clarifyingQuestions.question: Confirm which melting cheese should read on camera (Mexican blend default, Pepper Jack for stretch spikes, or a split layer for color contrast)?
clarifyingQuestions.reason: Melt sheen color temperature and blister density shift reference lighting and climax satisfaction beat.

clarifyingQuestions.question: Should the heroic final beat emphasize bare blistered cheesy tops or lavish cilantro-avocado-sour cream finish for brand color?
clarifyingQuestions.reason: Topping density competes with cheese-pull readability and closing plate composition framing.
